data.title: APJAKTU - Detailed Time Table of B.Tech S4 Honours Examination, April 2026 (2024 admission)
data.description_html: It is notified to the attention of all concerned that the B.Tech S4 Honours Examination April 2026 (2024 admission) is scheduled to be conducted on 02.06.2026, Tuesday. The exam will be held from 9.30 am - 12.00 pm. The detailed timetable is furnished below.
data.description_text: It is notified to the attention of all concerned that the  B.Tech S4 Honours Examination April 2026 (2024 admission)  is scheduled to be conducted on  02.06.2026, Tuesday . The exam will be held from 9.30 am - 12.00 pm. The detailed timetable is furnished below.

data.title: The publication of the Rank List for B.Tech S3 Inter-College Transfer for the AY 2026-2027 by the colleges has been rescheduled from 28.05.2026 to 29.05.2026 (on or before 11.00 A.M.)
data.description_html: The publication of the Rank List for B.Tech S3 Inter-College Transfer for the AY 2026-2027 by the colleges has been rescheduled from 28.05.2026 to 29.05.2026 (on or before 11.00 A.M.) due to the Bakrid holiday declared by the Government of Kerala, while the last date for submission of applications/requests by students remains unchanged as 26.05.2026 up to 5.00 P.M
data.description_text: The publication of the Rank List for B.Tech S3 Inter-College Transfer for the AY 2026-2027 by the colleges has been rescheduled from 28.05.2026 to  29.05.2026 (on or before 11.00 A.M.)  due to the Bakrid holiday declared by the Government of Kerala, while the last date for submission of applications/requests by students remains unchanged as 26.05.2026 up to 5.00 P.M
